title: Ride within your limits
detail: Group pace is set by the slowest rider, not the fastest. No overtaking the lead rider. If you're uncomfortable with the pace, say so on the group — there's no shame in it.

title: Gear is non-negotiable
detail: Helmet (full-face preferred), riding jacket, gloves, and proper boots on every ride. No gear, no ride — this applies to riders and pillions.

title: Stay in formation
detail: We ride in a staggered formation, one lane position apart. Corner marking: the rider ahead signals blind turns and hazards for the rider behind.

title: No riding under influence
detail: Zero tolerance for alcohol or substances before or during a ride. This is the fastest way to get removed from the group.

title: Fuel up together
detail: Start every ride with a full tank. We stop as a group for fuel, food, and photo breaks — nobody gets left behind.

title: Respect the roads and locals
detail: No loud exhausts through villages, no littering, no blocking traffic for photos. We're guests on every road we ride.

title: RSVP means commit
detail: If you RSVP on WhatsApp, show up or drop out with enough notice. Ride leads plan fuel stops and headcounts around confirmed riders.
